stages.signal: chosen/rejected preferences; dpo_norm; beta 5 in pinned recipe
verifiable GSM/MATH/IF rewards; GRPO; no reward model
stages.observed_artifact: published final checkpoint at step 1920 / episode 1,474,560

stages.outgoing: authorized or denied effect plus receipt
stages.observed_artifact: application policy/credential/audit record, absent from model weights
stages.guarantee: identity, scope, confirmation, idempotency, and rollback

decision_note: The recipe improves its reported average and target reasoning/IF metrics, while the safety average regresses. That trade-off must remain visible; weights do not replace runtime authority or a deployment-specific safety gate.
